title: Simple Chat App Interface with Avatar

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Simple Chat App Interface with Avatar

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#C06C88`
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#F7F7F7`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50, 50)'>
  <rect x='0' y='0' width='300' height='200' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
  <text x='20' y='30' font-size='20' fill='#C06C88'>John Doe</text>
  <g x='0' y='50'>
    <rect x='10' y='10' width='280' height='180' fill='#F7F7F7'/>
    <text x='15' y='20' font-size='16' fill='#090a0f'>Message 1 from John Doe</text>
    <text x='15' y='40' font-size='16' fill='#090a0f'>Message 2 from Jane Doe</text>
    <text x='15' y='60' font-size='16' fill='#090a0f'>Message 3 from John Doe</text>
  </g>
  <rect x='10' y='220' width='280' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <rect x='15' y='230' width='260' height='30' fill='#C06C88' rx='10'/>
  <text x='20' y='245' font-size='16' fill='#090a0f'>Type your message</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use a user's avatar at the top-left corner
Must display a list of messages with corresponding user names
Must have a text input field at the bottom to type a new message
Must be fully interactive with state updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Simple Chat App Interface with Avatar

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, form logic, active selections, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
